creator: hiren.panchasara@gmail.com
text:
On Sun, Apr 7, 2013 at 12:32 PM, Koop Mast <kwm@rainbow-runner.nl> wrote:

> You need to update your install ports first before gimp will be buildable.
> http://www.freebsd.org/doc/**handbook/ports-using.html<http://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/ports-using.html>Chapter 5.6.5.2 or 5.6.5.3.
>
> Package dependency requirement 'atk >= 2.2.0' could not be satisfied.
> Package 'atk' has version '2.0.1', required version is '>= 2.2.0'
>

I tried "portupgrade -a" to update all my outdated ports but it failed to
quite do so.

I had to manually update atk, glib and gtk.

After that, I could install gimp.

I am not sure if there an issue which needs fixing or not but I think we
should close this PR.

thanks,
Hiren
